MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $633.00 FILED BY TAPIA, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT 124 TURK STREET L P ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
